How to Get Last-Minute Sidemen Charity Match 2026 Tickets

Your complete guide to securing tickets for the biggest YouTube creator football event of the year at Wembley Stadium

• February 19, 2026 • 📖 6 min read

April 18

Match Date

3:00 PM

Kick-off

Wembley

90,000 Capacity

2025 Raised

The Sidemen Charity Match 2026 is shaping up to be one of the most anticipated creator events of the year. Scheduled for Saturday, April 18, 2026, at London's iconic Wembley Stadium, this year's match will see the Sidemen face off against the YouTube Allstars in what promises to be an unforgettable day of football, entertainment, and charity fundraising.

If you missed out on general ticket sales, don't panic—several avenues remain open for securing last-minute tickets to this epic showdown. Whether you're a die-hard Sidemen fan or simply looking for an incredible day out at one of the world's most famous stadiums, this guide will walk you through every option available.

Quick Navigation

→ Event Details → Teams & Players → Last-Minute Ticket Options → Hospitality Packages → Tips for Securing Tickets → Venue Information

Sidemen Charity Match 2026: Event Details

The Sidemen Charity Match has grown from a modest creator football game into one of the UK's biggest annual sporting events. Following the massive success of the 2025 match, which raised an incredible £4.7 million for Children in Need and other charitable organizations, expectations for 2026 are sky-high.

Teams and Players

This year's match features an exciting twist on the traditional format. In a surprising turn of events, some of the biggest Sidemen personalities will be switching allegiances to create an even more competitive and entertaining spectacle.

Sidemen FC

The Sidemen FC roster will feature the remaining Sidemen members who haven't crossed over, joined by other prominent creators from the YouTube community. While the complete lineup is still being finalized, fans can expect high-energy performances from established Sidemen players.

YouTube Allstars

The Allstars team has gained significant firepower with the addition of major Sidemen names including KSI, Miniminter (Simon Minter), and Behzinga (Ethan Payne). This unprecedented crossover promises to create one of the most competitive Charity Matches yet.

Special Format: This year's unique team structure—where key Sidemen members will actually compete against their usual teammates—adds an extra layer of drama and rivalry that fans have never seen before.

Last-Minute Ticket Options

General public ticket sales have concluded, but don't lose hope. Several legitimate avenues remain for securing your spot at Wembley:

1. Ticketmaster Resale Platform

Your first port of call should be Ticketmaster's official resale platform. This is the safest and most reliable way to purchase tickets from fans who can no longer attend. Prices are typically face value or close to it, and tickets come with full buyer protection.

⚠️ Important: Only purchase through official channels. Avoid unofficial resale sites and social media sellers to protect yourself from scams.

2. Hospitality Packages via Seat Unique

For those seeking a premium experience, hospitality packages are still available through Seat Unique. These packages not only guarantee entry but also provide an elevated matchday experience with added perks.

3. Last-Minute Ticket Releases

Occasionally, additional tickets are released closer to the event date due to returns or production holds. Keep checking the official Sidemen FC website and Ticketmaster regularly for any surprise drops.

4. Fan Communities and Waitlists

Join official Sidemen fan groups and Discord servers. Sometimes fans who can't attend will offer tickets to community members at face value before listing them publicly.

Hospitality Packages: The Premium Option

If general admission tickets are proving elusive, hospitality packages offer a guaranteed way to attend while enjoying VIP treatment. Available through Seat Unique, these packages start from £159 (with some options available from £99+).

What's Included in Hospitality Packages?

  • Premium seating with excellent views of the pitch
  • Complimentary food and beverage options
  • Private entrance to avoid main crowd queues
  • Access to hospitality lounges before, during, and after the match
  • Smart casual dress code (no need for formal attire)
  • Dedicated hospitality staff for assistance

How to Book Hospitality

Contact Seat Unique

  • Phone: +44 (0)208 706 0164
  • Email: enquiries@seatunique.com
  • Website: seatunique.com

Essential Tips for Securing Last-Minute Tickets

💡 Pro Tips

  1. 1.
    Set up alerts on Ticketmaster for any ticket releases or resale listings.
  2. 2.
    Follow official channels — @Sidemen on Twitter/X and Instagram often announce surprise ticket releases.
  3. 3.
    Be flexible with seating — you might find tickets in different sections than originally planned.
  4. 4.
    Act fast — last-minute tickets sell within minutes of being listed.
  5. 5.
    Consider hospitality — while pricier, it guarantees entry and provides a premium experience.
  6. 6.
    Check multiple times daily — ticket availability changes constantly as people return tickets.

Wembley Stadium: Venue Information

Wembley Stadium needs no introduction. With a capacity of 90,000, it's the largest stadium in the UK and one of the most iconic sporting venues in the world. Located in Wembley, London HA9 0WS, the stadium is easily accessible via public transport.

Getting There

  • Wembley Park Station (Jubilee and Metropolitan lines) — 10-minute walk
  • Wembley Stadium Station (Chiltern Railways) — 5-minute walk
  • Wembley Central Station (Bakerloo line and Overground) — 15-minute walk

Stadium Policies

Wembley Stadium has strict bag and security policies. Only small bags (A4 size or smaller) are permitted, and all attendees will undergo security screening. Arrive early to avoid queues and ensure you don't miss any of the pre-match entertainment.

Charitable Impact: Where Your Money Goes

Every ticket purchased contributes to an incredible cause. The 2026 match supports Bright Side and BBC Children in Need — two organizations doing vital work supporting vulnerable children and young people across the UK.

The 2025 Sidemen Charity Match raised over £4.7 million for charitable causes, demonstrating the incredible power of the creator community to drive meaningful change.

Your attendance isn't just about watching an incredible football match — it's about being part of something bigger. Every ticket contributes directly to changing lives.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are general admission tickets completely sold out?

General public sales have concluded, but tickets may become available through official resale channels and last-minute releases. Keep checking Ticketmaster regularly.

What's the cheapest way to attend?

The cheapest legitimate option is through Ticketmaster's official resale platform at face value. Avoid unofficial sellers. Hospitality packages start from £99-£159 if general tickets remain unavailable.

Can I buy tickets on the day?

Wembley Stadium box office may release any remaining tickets on match day, but this is not guaranteed. It's strongly advised to secure tickets in advance through official channels.

Is there an age restriction?

The Sidemen Charity Match is a family-friendly event. Children of all ages are welcome, though under-16s must be accompanied by an adult.

Don't Miss Out!

The Sidemen Charity Match 2026 promises to be an unforgettable day of football, entertainment, and fundraising. Start your ticket hunt today!

Check Ticketmaster → View Hospitality →
